title: SEO and Research Preset Pack
description: Profiles and starter templates for SEO audits, academic metadata, datasets, evaluation, and reports.

files.content: SEO and Research preset pack installed. Copy profiles into your project or reference the bundled config/profiles directory.

php bin/mnb-scraper template:create seo-audit --output-dir=projects/seo-audit --name=seo-audit
php bin/mnb-scraper template:create academic-metadata --output-dir=projects/academic --name=academic
